scripts.start: concurrently -k "webpack serve --config webpack.renderer.config.js" "webpack --watch --config webpack.main.config.js --env dev" "webpack --watch --config webpack.preload.config.js --env dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.build: NODE_ENV=production webpack --config webpack.main.config.js --mode production && NODE_ENV=production webpack --config webpack.preload.config.js --mode production && NODE_ENV=production webpack --config webpack.renderer.config.js --mode production
scripts.dist: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder
scripts.dist:dir: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist:linux: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --linux
scripts.dist:win: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:mac: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --mac
